description.description: The test description, briefly explaining which behavior it exercises

comment.description: Any additional comments about the test

instance.description: The instance which should be validated against the schema in "schema".

valid.description: Whether validation of this instance is expected to be valid or not.

assertions.description: Assertions for annotation output. Each assertion specifies a keyword, instance location, and expected annotation values keyed by schema location.

location.description: The instance location as a JSON Pointer.

expected.description: An object mapping schema locations (URIs) to expected annotation values.

oneOf.description: No assertion — implementation results will be reported without comparing against an expected value.
